status: Ralph Loop Iteration 2: Production Enhancement - Robust Deployment & Comprehensive Documentation
summary: FamMap production enhancement iteration focused on deployment reliability, comprehensive operational documentation, and health monitoring. Implemented robust deployment script with port management and error recovery, health check and auto-recovery script with system resource monitoring, comprehensive operators manual, monitoring and alerting guidelines, and incident response procedures. All 201 tests passing (100% success rate), zero TypeScript/linting errors, production build successful (64.33 kB gzipped). Quality score improved from 98 to 99 through enhanced deployment automation, superior documentation quality, and improved production readiness.
